commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `runEmbeddedPiAgent` so `enqueueGlobal` merges the trigger-derived `sessionQueuePriority` into its command-queue options before queueing the embedded run body.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: an injected `enqueue` harness can capture the outer session enqueue and nested global enqueue; current `main` gives the session call `foreground` or `background` but leaves the global call without priority. I did not run a live repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review should ask for after-fix runtime proof and decide whether to require a small regression test; automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof.

target.title: fix(pi-embedded-runner): propagate trigger-derived priority to the global lane
target.author: coreindustries
